title: SBGUtil
description: Simple utility for some baseball servers
body:
A simple mod. It increases the render distance of the snowballs to the limit allowed by the server. It works well on servers that mainly provide baseball content.

![without mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83b1f5c3aca335cbb1f1d62171f636371f299386.webp)

without mod



![with mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49b705848dad32b83fb4fb22ed17bbc4985b7de6.webp)

with mod
